function: Detects lack of stable pattern recognition or direction; perception anchored in ambiguity or missing data
authentic_output: Uncertainty Compass or Wanderer's Toolkit engaged; curiosity fueled
information_provided: Lack of stable pattern recognition or direction; perception anchored in ambiguity or missing data.

response_protocol.detect: Detect insufficient data, contradictory signals, or lack of grounding
response_protocol.assess: Assess depth of ambiguity and grounding availability
response_protocol.respond: Engage Uncertainty Compass or Wanderer's Toolkit, fuels curiosity
response_protocol.release: Avoid premature closure or false certainty; allow orientation to emerge

decay_model: persists until sufficient grounding or orientation input is received
